rawAssistant: A trip to the marsh, eh? With your Emberfox poisoned, you'll want something to help counteract that nasty affliction. I've got just what you need: an Antidote potion. It's a strong cure for poison, and it should do the trick if you act fast. We can also throw in some additional supplies to keep you both safe on the road – perhaps some extra vials of charms or a few more potions?
